metadata.title: Symbol linking
metadata.description: Adds ability to link with any trigger. Each trigger can limit linking to specific folders or file.

regex.source: Notice(`Unable to get the file at path: ${value.obj.filePath}. Please open an issue on GitHub, as this should not happen.`,0)
regex.target: Notice(`无法获取路径 ${value.obj.filePath} 下的文件。请在 GitHub 上提交问题，这是不应该发生的。`,0)

regex.source: Notice(`Unable to get the file at path: ${settings.addNewNoteTemplateFile}. Verify the path in the settings.`)
regex.target: Notice(`无法获取路径 ${settings.addNewNoteTemplateFile} 下的文件。请在设置中验证该路径。`)

regex.source: Notice(`Unable to create new note at path: ${value.obj?.filePath}. Please open an issue on GitHub, https://github.com/Mara-Li/symbol-linking/issues`,0)
regex.target: Notice(`无法在路径 ${value.obj?.filePath} 创建新笔记。请在 GitHub 上提交问题，https://github.com/Mara-Li/symbol-linking/issues`,0)

regex.source: Notice(`Unable to get the file at path: ${value.obj?.filePath}. Please open an issue on GitHub, as this should not happen.`,0)
regex.target: Notice(`无法获取路径 ${value.obj?.filePath} 下的文件。请在 GitHub 上提交问题，这是不应该发生的。`,0)

regex.source: Notice("Trigger symbol must be a single character.")
regex.target: Notice("触发符号必须是单个字符。")

regex.source: Notice(`Unable to find folder at path: ${folder.path}. Please add it if you want to limit links to this folder.`)
regex.target: Notice(`无法在路径 ${folder.path} 找到文件夹。如果您想限制链接到此文件夹，请添加它。`)

regex.source: Notice(`Unable to find template file at path: ${settings.addNewNoteTemplateFile}.md`)
regex.target: Notice(`无法在路径 ${settings.addNewNoteTemplateFile}.md 找到模板文件。请在设置中验证该路径。`)

regex.source: Notice(`Unable to find folder for new notes at path: ${settings.addNewNoteDirectory}. Please add it if you want to create new notes in this folder.`)
regex.target: Notice(`无法在路径 ${settings.addNewNoteDirectory} 找到新笔记文件夹。如果您想在此文件夹中创建新笔记，请添加它。`)
Notice("无效的正则表达式或标志")

regex.source: Notice("Convertir the settings of @ symbol linking to custom suggester")
regex.target: Notice("将 @ 符号链接的设置转换为自定义建议器")

regex.source: Notice("Add new note template file path is not set. Please set it in the settings.")
regex.target: Notice("添加新笔记模板文件路径未设置。请在设置中设置它。")
.log("符号链接：创建第一个链接时出错",error)

regex.source: .error(`@ Symbol Linking: Unable to read core plugin templates config at path: ${coreTemplatesConfigPath}`)
regex.target: .error(`@ Symbol Linking: Unable to read core plugin templates config at path: ${coreTemplatesConfigPath}`)

regex.source: text:"If no folders are added, links will be sourced from all folders."
regex.target: text:"If no folders are added, links will be sourced from all folders."

regex.source: text:"May be slower than the native popup."
regex.target: text:"May be slower than the native popup."

regex.source: text:"When set above 0, you'll need to press escape, return/enter, or type over X spaces to close the popup."
regex.target: text:"When set above 0, you'll need to press escape, return/enter, or type over X spaces to close the popup."

regex.source: .setName("Append as header if it doesn't exist")
regex.target: .setName("如果标题不存在则追加为标题")

regex.source: .setName("Add new note if it doesn't exist")
regex.target: .setName("如果笔记不存在则添加新笔记")
.setName("让弹窗保持打开 X 个空格的时间")
.setName("从搜索查询中移除重音符号")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Limit to one files for contact linking, using the header (${messageAboutLevel}) as the contact name.
				Leave empty to use the directories structure instead.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`将联系人链接限制为单个文件，使用标题 (${messageAboutLevel}) 作为联系人名称。
				留空则使用目录结构。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`If the header doesn't exist when ${this.plugin.settings.triggerSymbol} linking, add an option to create the header ${atTheLevel} in the end of the file.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`当使用 ${this.plugin.settings.triggerSymbol} 链接时，如果标题不存在，则添加一个选项在文件末尾创建 ${atTheLevel} 级标题。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`If the note doesn't exist when ${this.plugin.settings.triggerSymbol} linking, add an option to create the note.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`当使用 ${this.plugin.settings.triggerSymbol} 链接时，如果笔记不存在，则添加一个选项创建该笔记。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Folder to create new notes in when using ${this.plugin.settings.triggerSymbol} linking. If the limit directories is used, the folder will be the limited directory selected by the trigger.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`使用 ${this.plugin.settings.triggerSymbol} 链接时创建新笔记的文件夹。如果使用了限制目录，该文件夹将是触发符号选择的受限目录。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("e.g. \xE9 -> e when searching or creating links via the popup.")
regex.target: .setDesc("例如：在通过弹窗搜索或创建链接时，\xE9 会转换为 e。")
